---
name: list-agents
description: 'List available DuckyAI agents. Use when asked to list agents, show agents, what agents are available, or show orchestrator agents.'
---

# List Agents

List all available DuckyAI orchestrator agents.

## Instructions

Run `duckyai orchestrator list-agents` and display the results showing agent names, triggers, input/output paths, and schedules.

Add `--json-output` flag if you need to parse the result programmatically.
